resources.string: Display debug text under chat bubbles for font source and weight.
When generation stops due to token limit (not manual cancel), automatically continue once.
After enabling, go back to chat and send a message with **bold** to compare rendering.
Check for updates from GitHub API or Cloudflare cache.
Refresh the remote OpenRouter capability cache used for OpenAI-compatible model aliases.
Failed to refresh model capability database: %1$s
Enable Developer Mode to view logs.
Select a log to view details
Set background image for assistant chat page
Apply blur effect to background image
Add color overlay for better readability
Set default chat model for assistant. If not set, global default will be used.
Only send the last N messages to the model.
Bind a persistent Linux workspace to this assistant
Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? This cannot be undone.
Run this assistant on a schedule
This will remove the task and cancel future runs.
Please fill in prompt and a valid schedule
Disabled tasks won\'t run but keep configuration
1-31, or -1 for last day (auto clamps to month length)
Send a notification when this run completes
Uses assistant\'s background model by default
Try to run as close to the scheduled time as possible
Exact alarms not allowed; will fall back to WorkManager
Open system settings to allow exact alarms
JSON must be an object, e.g. {"key":"value"}
Use QuickJS engine to execute JavaScript code for calculations and scripting
Execute Python code locally (Chaquopy) in the current conversation workspace. Requires workspace root permission.
Allow assistant to interact with device (Send Notifications, Read Notifications, Launch Apps, Set Alarms, Set Reminders).
Allow assistant to read/write files in the current conversation workspace. Requires workspace root permission.
Allow assistant to create/update/delete entries in enabled lorebooks (undoable via history).
Allow assistant to look up its saved memories by keyword during the conversation.
Allow assistant to search past chat conversations by keyword.
Allow assistant to create, update, and delete scheduled tasks (requires approval)
Allow assistant to ask you questions when uncertain
Allow assistant to call a tool to get the current date, time and weekday
Max generation tokens. Leave empty for no limit.
When enabled, the model will try to remember information from your conversation for future use. Requires tool support.
Let the assistant keep important details active only in the current conversation, such as settings, outlines, and requirements.
Controls message format sent to LLM. Usually doesn\'t need modification.
When enabled, assistant will reference recent chat history for better context
Define regex patterns to transform messages before sending/receiving
Visual Only (Only affects display, not actual message)
Use tags to organize and find assistants
Used only for routing; never replies
Consolidates the group chat and writes memories into enabled members
Multiple seats match your @ mention. Choose who you meant.
Select at least one seat for @%1$s.
Don\'t modify this unless you know what you are doing
Use assistant avatar and name in chat instead of model\'s
App needs restart to apply settings.
Starts only when the app is in foreground and network is available. Note: may use mobile data.
Keep at most %d auto backups. Oldest will be deleted.
Edit the summary content used for compressed context
Failed to save summary. Try again later.
This will remove previous messages from the current context. Continue?
Please chat first before editing title
Conversation JSON is ready to share
Conversation does not exist or was deleted
Clear remembered approvals for this chat
Cleared remembered approvals for this chat
Workspace root folder is required. Set the default root in Settings → Skills, or authorize another root folder for this conversation.
Workspace root folder is required. Please set it in Settings → Skills.
For Global Users, get Discord Role
Generated by AI, may contain inaccuracies.
Select aspect ratio for generated image
Are you sure you want to cancel generation?
Select AI model for image generation
Describe the image you want to generate...
No AI providers available, please add in settings
Camera permission required to take photos
Some permissions permanently denied, please enable in settings:
Allow reading photos to display local images in messages
Allow reading videos to display local videos in messages
Allow reading photos and videos to display local media in messages
Model uses the deepest supported reasoning.
Continue is only available for the latest assistant message.
Continue is not supported in group chat yet.
Use pure black background in dark mode
Automatically collapse thinking content when done
Show model icon in chat list
Automatically collapse code blocks by default
Wrap long lines in code blocks
Create a new conversation when app starts
Show more debug features. Not recommended for normal users.
Enable haptic feedback during message generation
Show notification when message generation completes in background
Fade out chat suggestions when they cover message text
Apply a frosted-glass blur to the chat top bar
Follow new output while a message is generating. Turn this off to keep your reading position.
Notifications will be pushed during message generation after enabling. If it does not take effect, please select Compatibility Mode.
Show quick jump button when scrolling chat
Show assistant name and time before messages
When providers share the same first tag, merge them in model selection
Show token statistics below AI responses
Choose between the standard and minimal input bar
Show the fullscreen input button when the input bar is expanded
Show context sources (modes, memories, lorebooks) in message toolbar
Show a divider in chat when older messages are summarized into context
If timeout, skip this retrieval. Unit: seconds
When memory retrieval is skipped, reuse memories injected in the last turn
Remove all always-allow and always-deny decisions so future tool calls ask again.
Use a single text box to edit JSON for custom headers and body.
Edit the system prompt template for each built-in tool.
This will remove your custom prompt for this tool.
Show Export Conversation as JSON Button
Show the \"Export JSON\" action in conversation long-press menu.
Retry temporary server or network errors automatically
Wait this long before each retry
Show user avatar in chat messages
Show the assistant\'s avatar before messages
Skip crop screen after picking image
Automatically check GitHub for new app versions
Customize fonts for headers, content, and code
Use same font for headers and content
Link header and content font settings together
Code, inline code, and monospace text
This will reset all font settings to their defaults. Custom fonts will be kept but no longer applied.
This will reset the font settings for %1$s to defaults.
This is a preview of the content font. It shows how body text will appear in messages and other content areas.
Custom text styling for roleplay patterns
Enable tactile feedback when tapping buttons and controls
Add custom HTTP headers for MCP server requests
Tools list unavailable during creation. Please view after adding.
Model for generating chat suggestions. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Model for summarizing chat titles. Recommend fast/cheap model.
Model used to generate readable names from model IDs.
Used to search, read webpages, and summarize results.
Select built-in tools supported by this model.
Enable xAI built-in web search (third-party endpoints may not support this)
Logs are stored in the same database as Chat Records.
Tap to preview · Long press to select
No images found for this assistant
Tap to open · Long press to select
No files found for this assistant
Tap a month to select chats · Long press to select all
This deletes image files from this assistant’s chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes attachment files from this assistant’s chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes %1$d image files (%2$s) from this assistant’s chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes %1$d image files (%2$s) from all assistants’ chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes %1$d attachment files (%2$s) from this assistant’s chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes %1$d attachment files (%2$s) from all assistants’ chats (files only). Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
Delete selected chat records (files excluded). This action cannot be undone!
Type the selected conversation count (%1$d) to confirm.
This deletes attachment files from this assistant’s chats. Chat history will be kept, but links may break.
This deletes this assistant’s chat records and attachment files.
Clear temporary cache files. The app may rebuild them later.
Scan for leftover files not referenced by current chats/settings (including orphan skill packages).
This will delete files that are not referenced by current chats/settings. Make sure you have backups.
Request logs are stored in Chat Records database.
You haven\'t configured API and models yet.
View user manual and help docs
Support the author if you like this app
Import a zip that contains at least one SKILL.md
This will remove “%1$s” from device storage.
Skill scripts, workspace root, and Python dependencies
For new chats, automatically apply the workspace you last set manually.
Skip approval cards for workspace file tools. Dangerous.
When enabled, the assistant can execute workspace file operations without showing approval cards (including delete/overwrite). Proceed with caution.
Scripts can read/write your workspace folder and run code on your device. Only enable for trusted Skill packages.
This will delete the selected items from your device.
Number of results each search provider returns per query
How multiple selected providers are combined
Use a sub-agent to search, read pages and summarize results
When the search sub-agent is on, replace the original search and scraping tools with the search sub-agent tool
LastChat - Open Source AI Assistant\n\nWebsite: https://rikka-ai.com/
Click button below to add models
No keys yet. Add one or import from the clipboard.
Comma, space, or line breaks are all supported. Duplicates are skipped.
Manage several keys separately and choose which ones are used.
Add a chat model before testing individual keys.
Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This cannot be undone.
Couldn\'t fetch models from the API. Try adding an API key!
Couldn\'t fetch any models from the API. Maybe this provider doesn\'t support model fetching. You can add models manually though!
Configure custom provider settings for this model. Inherits common properties from parent.
Response API is OpenAI\'s new API. Most providers don\'t support it. Keep off if unsure.
It looks like you don\'t have this provider in your list. Don\'t worry, we have a preset ready for you!
Xiaomi MiMo speech synthesis with built-in voices
Hello, this is a text-to-speech test.
Quick access to chat with an assistant
* SiliconFlow free models built-in. No API Key needed. For more powerful models, please use your own API Key.
Could not load this chat (it may be too large). Delete it from the drawer or start a new chat.
Current message count: %1$d. This may cause app crashes, freezes, or even loss of this chat data. Please start a new chat as soon as possible.
Tools are disabled for current model. Please enable tools in settings to use Skills/Local tools/Search/MCP.
Model for text embeddings (e.g. for memory).
Your assistant won\'t remember this chat and you won\'t be able to access it once you close it.
Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This cannot be undone.
Significance scoring and core memory formation
Max memories to retrieve & inject (0 = none, still limited by token budget). Current: %1$d
Allow assistant to form long-term memories
Model used for memory consolidation tasks
Model used for context summarization tasks
Wait time after a chat ends before forming memories
How often to reflect on episodes to form core memories
All memories sent to model in every conversation
Adds titles and timestamps of recent conversations
Smart memory retrieval based on conversation context
Forms episodic memories with automatic consolidation
Includes significance scoring and core memory formation
Test RAG retrieval to see which memories are returned
Model used for background tasks like spontaneous notifications.
Uses built-in search when supported, otherwise falls back to providers selected above.
Check multiple providers to search in parallel (URL deduped).
Keep complete tool results in prompt context (no optimization).
Drop from prompt after N user messages, and retrieve relevant results via RAG.
Tool results older than %d user messages will be discarded.
Keep tool results within the latest %d user messages.
Minimum similarity score (0.0 = include all, 1.0 = only perfect matches). Lower values include more tool results. Current: %1$s
Configure web search for this assistant.
Maximum tokens for context (System + Chat + Memories).
Assistant can message you without prompting
Use the suggestion model to show greetings on the new chat screen.
Generate a new set of greetings now.
Instructions for spontaneous messages. Use {{history}} and {{memories}}.
Applying globally will overwrite existing prompts.
No memories retrieved. Try lowering the similarity threshold or check if embeddings are generated.
Minimum similarity score (0.0 = include all, 1.0 = only perfect matches). Lower values include more memories. Current: %1$s
Hi—what would you like to chat about?
Failed to write text into clipboard
Download started, check status bar for progress
Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?
The base URL usually ends with `/v1beta`
Are you sure you want to delete this search service?
Controls Exa search depth and speed
searchResults: multiple sources, sourcedAnswer: synthesized answer
Use an xAI model that supports web search
Customize the base URL, API type, and system prompt
Turn this on if non-streaming requests fail
Standard is faster/cheaper, Deep is more comprehensive
xAI web search with cited answers
Google search results through Serper API
Bing search does not require any configuration.
When on, only the summary and notes from the search sub-agent are sent to the model, filtering out source details
Use stealth mode for web scraping
Define custom styling rules for text wrapped in specific patterns. For example, make *text* appear gray for actions, or %text% yellow for emphasis.
No rules yet. Tap + to add one.
Text wrapped like %1$stext%1$s will be styled
I\'m doing great! How can I help you today?
Let me think about this... The user is greeting me, so I should respond warmly.
Are you sure you want to delete this TTS service?
Only text inside %1$s...%1$s will be read
Text wrapped like %1$stext%1$s will be filtered
Your ElevenLabs API key from your account settings
Skip: Text matching the pattern will be skipped.\nOnly Read: Only text matching the pattern will be read.
No rules yet. Tap + to add one.
Custom prompts that can be toggled on/off
Define custom prompts that can be toggled on/off per chat. Higher priority modes are injected first.
Add modes to inject custom prompts
Create organized collections of prompts that activate based on keywords or semantic similarity.
Add lorebooks to inject context-aware prompts
Tap to select an image or emoji
Add entries to inject prompts when triggered
Select which lorebooks to use with this assistant
Create lorebooks in Settings → Prompt Injections → Lorebooks
Select which lorebooks to use with this assistant
Limit messages sent to model (0 = unlimited)
Generate summaries of pruned messages to preserve context
Images older than the threshold are replaced with OCR text to save context tokens. Requires an OCR model configured in Settings.
Keep all file contents in context
Files older than the threshold are replaced with AI summaries to save context tokens. Summaries are pre-generated in the background. Requires a context summarizer model.
Compress conversation into a summary to free up context space
Show summarize button in chat input
Configure a context summary model (or chat model) in settings first
This will summarize your conversation history into a compact form. The AI will remember the key points but detailed messages will be replaced with a summary.
Auto-summarize when %d unsummarized messages are reached
Set max history messages above to enable
Only keep the most recent messages in context
Only the latest %d messages will be sent to model
Please enter a valid integer greater than or equal to 1
%1$d messages will be summarized and ~%2$d tokens will be cleaned up.
Ask a question about this text…
You are a translator. Translate the selected text to {{language}}.\nOnly output the translation, nothing else. Do not include any explanations or notes.
You are a helpful assistant. Explain the following text in simple, easy-to-understand terms.\nBe concise but thorough. Use examples if helpful.
You are a summarization assistant. Provide a clear, concise summary of the following text.\nCapture the key points and main ideas. Be brief but complete.
You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user question about the provided text.\nUser question: {{custom_prompt}}
Are you sure you want to restore default actions? This will replace all your custom actions.
Select text anywhere on your device, look for \"LastChat\" in the toolbar that appears, and tap it to use these features.

This is sample text you can select! Try long-pressing to select these words, then look for \"LastChat\" in the selection toolbar. If you don\'t see it, you may need to tap the overflow menu (⋮) to find it.
👆 Long-press the text above to try selecting it
Browse Chaquopy PyPI (chaquo.com) and download wheels
May be incompatible with this device/Python version
This wheel may be incompatible with your device/Python version.
Contains native extensions; may be incompatible
Wheel (.whl) files may contain executable code. Only import from trusted sources.
Installed %1$s. Restart the app to apply changes.
This will permanently remove the workspace and its files.
Create one to manage files and Linux rootfs for assistants.
A workspace with this name already exists
Install a Linux rootfs so this workspace can run shell commands.
Configure which workspace tools require confirmation.
Enter a command to execute inside this workspace.
Set the working directory for the current session
Show warnings when this model group reaches the limit.
Off. Tap to set token limits and reset schedule.
Counts input, output, and cached input tokens.
If the month is shorter, it resets on the last day of that month.
Select models from this provider to share quota
No other models in this provider.
Reset token usage counter to zero?
This model is not counted against a token quota.
Turn off token quota for this model.
This model uses its own token limit.
Set a limit only for this model.
This model uses the group quota first. The single quota is kept but not active.
Share one quota with models from this provider.
Choose or create a group for this model.
This quota group no longer exists.
Group quota overrides the single quota for this model.
A model can only belong to one quota group under this provider.
Already in %1$s. Selecting it will move it here.
Keep at least one model in the group.
Delete this quota group? Models will keep their single-model quota settings.
Inject selected SKILL.md files into this conversation.
Choose what to add to this conversation.
Enable skills in assistant settings first.
